bottomQuartileNotes: Largest remaining gaps (see coverage HTML or test-gap-reports/ts-below-100-lines.txt): components/CodeViewer, FileExplorer, AiChat/index, hooks/useAtls and usePanelResize, services/orchestrator/swarmChat/subagentService, stores/terminalStore. Batch pipeline, opMap, prompts/shellGuide, utils/languageMap+shapeOps are at or near full line coverage. App.tsx is covered in Vitest via App.dom.test.tsx (mocked panels).
ciThresholds: vite.config.ts coverage.thresholds ratcheted with this baseline; use npm run test:coverage:check-100 to list files still below 100% lines.
